76009.subject: Robinhood’s Crypto Chain Explodes
76009.body:
----------
_**Your Weekly Deep Dive into The World of Crypto**_

**July 15, 2026 · ****5 Min Read**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/26f99b56-9751-4856-9ade-2b8ce455b7c7/image.png?t=1784096997)
Caption: **Live Market Snapshot | As of July 15, 2026 | Sources: CoinDesk, CryptoBriefing, CoinMarketCap, Alternative.me, SoSoValue**

## 📡** THIS WEEK IN CRYPTO**

**GM, Readers!**

Chaos week. Trump called the Iran ceasefire dead Wednesday, and $450M in leveraged crypto evaporated. By Friday, Bitcoin ETFs printed their first green week in two months, Robinhood launched a chain that became a memecoin casino overnight, and hackers ran a rug through a hijacked SpaceX X account.

BTC opened near $63,293, hit $61,492 (low) on July 8, then clawed above $64,600 by Friday on a short squeeze. Every degen who missed CASHCAT is asking what a Robinhood Chain wallet is. 

_**Let’s get into it...**_


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c53930f-b4d7-4e7d-baee-6a88bb56a6da/image.png?t=1781097813)
Caption: 

----------
# 🐋 THE BIG WHALE MOVES

### **1. Robinhood Built a Blockchain for Stocks. Degens Built a Cat Coin.**

Robinhood Chain[ went live July 1](https://robinhood.com/us/en/newsroom/robinhood-accelerates-global-expansion-robinhood-chain-mainnet-stock-tokens-agentic-trading/) as an Arbitrum L2 pitched at tokenized equities. Within nine days,[ daily volume hit $568M](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/09/arbitrum-jumps-19-benefitting-from-robinhood-s-usd568-million-onchain-trading-frenzy), with 75%+ memecoin activity. ARB[ jumped 19%](https://www.techtimes.com/articles/320117/20260710/robinhood-chains-568m-day-sends-arb-soaring-fee-revenue-blueprint.htm) on the news, and a cat token called[ CASHCAT](https://fortune.com/crypto/2026/07/13/robinhood-chain-memecoin-trading-cash-cat-vlad-tenev-crypto/) briefly hit a $150M market cap. CEO Vlad Tenev leaned in: "It works great for memes, too."

Then it turned. Protos reported honeypots, phishing links, and wallet drainers, with one CASHCAT holder reporting a[ $56K honeypot loss per TechTimes and Protos](https://www.techtimes.com/articles/320117/20260710/robinhood-chains-568m-day-sends-arb-soaring-fee-revenue-blueprint.htm). On July 12, hackers used SpaceX accounts to promote a rug (below).

_**Translation: **__Robinhood built rails for Wall Street. Degens showed up first. So did scammers._

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/75a266e1-81f3-4c8c-8d8d-b120ed6856d0/image.png?t=1784097053)
Caption: 

### **2. Tom Lee's BitMine Is 0.2% Away From Owning 5% of All ETH**

BitMine (BMNR)[ added another 40,000 ETH](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2074684833897603145) on July 8 via FalconX and Kraken for about $71.6M, following a[ disclosed](

76007.body:

 China gives the impression that its open-source artificial-intelligence models are more cuddly than America’s domineering proprietary ones.  And so everybody that is not America should adopt its technology.

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-15-oleh-bezuhlyi-xdxkf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BTzBKMwlwTDeKLlkjfAi71g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1SpyhqmbNIKIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrma3ziv~so-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrma3ziv-so
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Cooling US producer inflation and MetaMask’s new yield product boost market sentiment. However, escalating Middle Eastern tensions and skepticism over Fed inflation metrics maintain a backdrop of high-risk volatility for Bitcoin and global markets. 📈US producer inflation cools more than expected in June, Bitcoin holds above $65K June producer inflation data came in lower than anticipated, fueling hopes for Federal Reserve rate cuts later this year. Bitcoin responded positively to the macroeconomic shift, maintaining support above the critical $65,000 level. Read full story 🚨US airstrikes on Iran escalate as Tehran threatens Strait of Hormuz blockade Heightened military tensions between the US and Iran have sparked fears of a global energy crisis and economic instability. A potential blockade in the Strait of Hormuz could trigger significant volatility across traditional and crypto markets. See details 💰MetaMask launches Money Account for self-custodial earning up to 4% APY Consensys-owned MetaMask has introduced a "Money Account" allowing users to earn yield while maintaining self-custody. This move simplifies decentralized finance participation, bridging the gap between traditional savings and DeFi spending. Read full story 🏛️Federal Reserve Chair Warsh says recent inflation data is an imperfect gauge of underlying price pressures Former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh cautioned that current inflation metrics may not fully capture underlying economic reality. His critique suggests a potential shift in Fed policy thinking, which could influence future interest rate trajectories. Read full story ⛓️Coinbase ends USDC support on Noble network effective August 17, 2026 Coinbase has announced the sunsetting of USDC support for the Noble network within the Cosmos ecosystem. This decision impacts liquidity management and forces users to reconsider their stablecoin strategies on inter-blockchain protocols. See details 💳Tether leads $7M round into Pact Labs to build payroll infrastructure on Aptos Stablecoin giant Tether is spearheading an investment into Pact Labs to develop regulated payroll solutions. The project aims to integrate blockchain-based payments into traditional corporate financial systems using the Aptos network. Read full story 🌐Surging volumes on Robinhood Chain could benefit Ethereum High transacti

75999.subject: Emergent is a unicorn now. Thank you
